name: Amaretto Irish Cream Cheesecake-rec.foods
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup blanched whole almonds, roasted and finely chopped
1/3 cup blanched whole almonds, toasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients (vanilla wafer crumbs, roasted almonds, melted butter, and Amaretto) in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom of a lightly greased 10-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, then cool.
4. In another bowl, beat softened cream cheese until light and fluffy with an electric mixer.
5. Gradually add one cup sugar, beating well after each addition.
6. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each egg is incorporated.
7. Stir in the whipping cream and remaining ingredients (Irish cream liqueur, sour cream mixture).
8. Pour the batter into the pan and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven and leave the cheesecake inside for 30 minutes.
10. Combine the sour cream and remaining ingredients (sugar, vanilla extract) in a bowl.
11. Stir and spoon over the cake.
12. Sprinkle one-fourth cup toasted almonds around the edge of the pan.
13. Bake at 500 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes.
14. Cool and chill before serving.
This recipe makes 12 servings.
